---
title: 'Manna, Sarcasm, & Burritos (MSB)'
date: '2025-02-16T21:01:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: false
categories:
  - 'MSB'
---

<h4 style="text-align: left;">Manna, Sarcasm, &amp; Burritos (MSB) (Working Title...)&nbsp;</h4><div><div><i>Markus lost his wife and career, and now heâ€™s struggling to maintain a basic existence. His highest hopes are for a burrito and a distracting sitcom. His financial needs lead him to take part as a paid test subject which leaves him having hallucinations of a portal to another reality.&nbsp;</i></div><div><i><br /></i></div><div><i>Markus is then sucked into this portal with his cat Janie, only to find that she is a talking cat, and may actually be a powerful being who organized the entire event to get him to her reality.&nbsp;</i></div><div><i><br /></i></div><div><i>After using a stick turned light-saber to kill a dangerous wolf, earning himself a magical tattoo, Markus meets Koâ€™Akh, a Threxan dinosaur man, and begins his journey into a world of magicians and danger, he only hopes this new world has burritos!&nbsp;&nbsp;</i></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><div><i><b>Guiding Principle:&nbsp;</b></i></div><div><i><br /></i></div><div><div><i>In this science-fantasy, the use and study of magical Manna blurs the lines between science, magic, and theology. It offers new ways to explore age-old ideas inside exciting adventures.</i></div></div><div><i><br /></i></div><div><span style="text-align: center;"><br /></span></div><div><i><span style="text-align: center;">Cover is a placeholder, AI Generated&nbsp;</span><br style="text-align: center;" /></i></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiS_1_w-ZZ6AvnMlQMwnB-5StrvRU-R0E9YAimTpDYpXXAHKQlmP8aXWuocWm93weTgr8UZmdVYuMVGkTeJK6aG6MCdFT5lwZJ71MMM4guA4V_n4vhSoaVeN9legNwW7XTX99zbjz9lRRQJaonCQ2WBbbjh_xGyv9HZOO0nk2VtYd3j_qeqB76oJrtEXPo/s1557/MSB_Cover_Placeholder.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1557" data-original-width="1080" height="320" src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiS_1_w-ZZ6AvnMlQMwnB-5StrvRU-R0E9YAimTpDYpXXAHKQlmP8aXWuocWm93weTgr8UZmdVYuMVGkTeJK6aG6MCdFT5lwZJ71MMM4guA4V_n4vhSoaVeN9legNwW7XTX99zbjz9lRRQJaonCQ2WBbbjh_xGyv9HZOO0nk2VtYd3j_qeqB76oJrtEXPo/s320/MSB_Cover_Placeholder.jpg" width="222" /></a></div><br /><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;">This cover is a placeholder, AI Generated&nbsp;<br /></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><br /></td></tr></tbody></table><br /><div><br /></div>
<br />
<br />
<div id="mc_embed_signup">
<form action="https://darrellwolfe.us3.list-manage.com/subscribe/post?u=979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba&amp;id=14df3ba97b" class="validate" id="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" method="post" name="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" novalidate="" target="_blank">
<div id="mc_embed_signup_scroll">
<label>Subscribe Now - Pursue a No Hiding Lifestyle</label>&nbsp;<input class="email" id="mce-EMAIL" name="EMAIL" required="" type="email" value="" /><br />
<div aria-hidden="true" style="left: -5000px; position: absolute;">
<input name="b_979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba_14df3ba97b" tabindex="-1" type="text" value="" /></div>
<div class="clear">
<input class="button" id="mc-embedded-subscribe" name="subscribe" type="submit" value="Subscribe" /></div>
</div>
</form>
</div>
<br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Shalom: Live Long and Prosper!</span><br />
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;">Darrell Wolfe (DG Wolfe)</span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant @&nbsp;<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/start-here-about_12.html" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe.com</a></span><br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/" target="_blank">Clifton StrengthsFinder</a>: Intellection, Learner,&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Ideation,</span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">&nbsp;Achiever, Input</span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><a href="https://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality" target="_blank">16Personalities</a> (Myers-Briggs Type): INFJ</span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span></div>
</div>
